scripts.deploy:staging: sam deploy --stack-name ammas-banner-staging --region ap-south-1 --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND --parameter-overrides Environment=staging --resolve-s3 --no-confirm-changeset
scripts.deploy:prod: sam deploy --stack-name ammas-banner-production --region ap-south-1 --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND --parameter-overrides Environment=production --resolve-s3 --confirm-changeset
